headline: Constellation Energy (CEG) and LS Power Equity Advisors, LLC Announce an Agreement
summary: Constellation Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:CEG) is one of the Best Conservative Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 18, the company and LS Power Equity Advisors, LLC announced an agreement, according to which the former would sell a portfolio of generation assets in PJM to LS Power. This move focuses on addressing the regulatory commitments associated with […]

headline: Why Is Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) Down 6.9% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
